choose.otherwise: TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END = #{semester}
TO_CHAR(csm.year) || '-' || CASE csm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE csm.term END = #{semester}

mapper.select: SELECT s.name, d.dept_name AS major, s.year_level AS grade, TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END AS current_semester FROM student s JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id LEFT JOIN semester sm ON sm.is_current = 1 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT CASE WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN rp.start_at AND rp.end_at THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP < rp.start_at THEN 'NOT_STARTED' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS status, TO_CHAR(CAST(rp.end_at AS DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS deadline, GREATEST(0, CEIL(CAST(rp.end_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE)) AS days_left FROM student s JOIN semester sm ON JOIN registration_period rp ON rp.semester_id = sm.semester_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.period_type IN ('MAIN', 'ADD_DROP') AND (rp.target_year IS NULL OR rp.target_year = s.year_level) ORDER BY CASE WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN rp.start_at AND rp.end_at THEN 1 WHEN SYSTIMESTAMP < rp.start_at THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, rp.end_at FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.credits), 0) FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND ) AS applied, #{maxCredits} AS max_credits, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND ) AS course_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci JOIN course_section ccs ON ccs.section_id = ci.section_id JOIN semester csm ON csm.semester_id = ccs.semester_id WHERE ci.student_id = s.student_id AND ) AS cart_count FROM student s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT c.course_code AS course_id, c.course_name, p.name AS professor, ss.start_time, ss.end_time, cr.building || ' ' || cr.room_no AS room FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN professor p ON p.professor_id = cs.professor_id JOIN section_schedule ss ON ss.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN classroom cr ON cr.classroom_id = ss.classroom_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND ss.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND ORDER BY ss.start_time, c.course_name

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = ci.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE ci.student_id = s.student_id AND ) AS cart_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollment e JOIN course_section cs ON cs.section_id = e.section_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id LEFT JOIN review r ON r.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.student_id = s.student_id AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND r.review_id IS NULL AND ) AS review_pending_count FROM student s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}
